welcome:
Welcome to JaibCash! 👋
Choose your preferred language:
referral_stats:
Active referrals: {count}
Total referral earnings: {points} points
claim_already: You have no pending ad to claim right now.
wait_time: Please wait at least 5 seconds to watch the ad completely.
checkin_success:
✅ Daily check-in recorded!
You earned {points} points (day #{day})
already_checked: You already checked in today, come back tomorrow.
withdraw_min_error:
⚠️ Minimum withdrawal is ${min_usd} (i.e. {min_points} points).
Your current balance is {points} points.
withdraw_prompt: 💳 Send your TRC20 wallet address to request withdrawal:
withdraw_invalid_address: ⚠️ Invalid wallet address. Must start with T and be 34 characters long.
withdraw_requested: ✅ Withdrawal request submitted. It will be reviewed and processed manually within 48-72 hours.
unknown_command: Unknown command. Use /start for the main menu.
ad_watch_instructions:
🎬 How to watch:
1️⃣ Click the ad button and wait 15 seconds.
2️⃣ Close the ad window and return to the bot.
3️⃣ Press '✅ Watched' to get your points.
level_up: 🎉 Congratulations! You've reached level {level_name} and earned a bonus of {bonus} points!
tasks_create_msg: ➕ Coming soon: Create a new task.
banned: Your account is banned. Contact support.
advertiser_available_desc: Available: Use to create new tasks.
advertiser_spent_desc: When task is completed, deducted from frozen and added to executors.
advertiser_refund_desc: If task is cancelled, the amount is refunded to available.
ad_not_available: No ads available right now, try again later.
achievement_tip: Complete more tasks and referrals to unlock new achievements!
advertiser_no_balance:
⚠️ No available balance to withdraw.
Your available balance: 0.00$
advertiser_send_wallet: Send your TRC-20 wallet address to receive the amount.
advertiser_will_deduct: {amount:.2f}$ will be deducted from your available balance.
advertiser_withdraw_error: An error occurred, please try again.
advertiser_withdraw_submitted: Advertiser balance withdrawal request submitted successfully!
advertiser_withdraw_review: Your request will be reviewed and processed within 48-72 hours.
task_already_approved:
⚠️ Your submission for this task has already been approved.

You cannot execute the same task twice.
task_already_pending:
⏳ You have a pending submission for this task.

Please wait until it is reviewed.
task_proof_username_instruction: Send your username (or any required information) to prove execution.
task_proof_empty: ⚠️ Cannot be empty. Send your username.
task_proof_image_instruction:
Now send a screenshot proving your task execution.
Make sure the image is clear and shows the username you provided.
task_no_execution: ⚠️ No task in progress. Start again.
task_proof_submitted: Your proof has been submitted successfully!
task_review_pending:
Your submission will be reviewed by the task owner shortly.
You will receive a message once approved or rejected.
task_rejected_retry: You can try executing the task again.
wallet_charge_step1: Transfer the required amount to the above address via TRC-20 network.
wallet_charge_step2: Send the transferred amount (in USD) as a text message.
wallet_charge_screenshot_instruction: Send a screenshot of the transfer receipt.
ad_cooldown: ⏳ Please wait {seconds} seconds before watching another ad.
no_ads_available:
📭 No ads available right now.
Try again in a few minutes.
ad_watch_wait:
⏳ Please wait {remaining} more seconds to finish watching the ad.
(Watched {elapsed} of {total} seconds)
tasks_my_posts_empty: 📭 You haven't posted any tasks yet.
welcome_main: 👋 Welcome to JaibCash! Use the menu below to get started:
privacy_intro: At JaibCash, we are committed to protecting your privacy. Here's how we handle your data:
privacy_data_usage: How do we use your data?
privacy_usage_identity: To identify you and manage your balance.
privacy_usage_earnings: To track your earnings and referrals.
privacy_usage_contact: To communicate with you about the service.
privacy_protection_sharing: We do not share your data with any third party.
privacy_protection_encryption: All data is encrypted and stored securely.
privacy_contact_details: For any privacy-related questions, contact us at @abkhali.
privacy_agreement: By using the bot, you agree to this policy.
support_intro: If you need help, have a question, or encountered any issue, you can contact us through:
support_tip_faq: Make sure to read the FAQ first.
support_tip_user_id: Prepare your User ID to make it easier to assist you.
